events.title: Use agent builder in Copilot chat [Web]
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Use agent builder in Copilot chat [Web]
events.summary: Create custom agents in Copilot chat to streamline repetitive tasks and achieve consistency. Use specific instructions and grounding details to save time, reuse your agents, and enhance team productivity. Learn more.
events.summaryJa: Create custom agents in Copilot chat to streamline repetitive tasks and achieve consistency. Use specific instructions and grounding details to save time, reuse your agents, and enhance team productivity.

events.title: Ask questions about images with natural language [Android, iOS, Web]
events.titleEn: Ask questions about images with natural language [Android, iOS, Web]
events.summary: Easily gain insights from images by asking natural language questions. Upload images for quick analysis using advanced vision models—helping you make sense of visual data across your apps.

events.title: Gain insights with Copilot and Python in Excel on Web [Web]
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot のセキュリティ・管理・分析機能を強化
events.titleEn: Gain insights with Copilot and Python in Excel on Web [Web]
events.summary: Using everyday language, ask Copilot to perform advanced analytics like machine learning and predictive forecasting, which would usually take hours or require special skills. Copilot writes Python code and inserts it on the grid, providing deeper insights and stunning/ visuals....

events.title: SharePoint knowledge for agents [Web]
events.summary: Makers can now leverage additional data sources, including Dataverse and SharePoint, when building autonomous agents. This expands the variety of use cases for autonomous agents.

events.title: Simplified prompt experience in chat [Web]
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.summary: The chat experience in Word is now simplified with access to attachments, images, and agents now accessed from a single plus-sign menu.

events.title: Enhanced SharePoint URL support in Copilot Studio [Web]
events.titleEn: Enhanced SharePoint URL support in Copilot Studio [Web]
events.summary: Previously, only SharePoint site URLs could be used as knowledge for Copilot Studio agents. Users can now use SharePoint file, folder, and site URLs, including links from the Share button or browser address bar; once the URLs are added, the agents will be grounded to the content...

events.title: Public website scoping for agents [Web]
events.summary: Makers can now scope agents' knowledge sources to specific websites, enhancing the precision of web searches. This capability, previously available in custom agents from Microsoft Copilot Studio, is now extended to agents in the Microsoft 365 context. Learn more.

events.title: Collect user feedback in Copilot Studio agent builder [Web]
events.titleEn: Collect user feedback in Copilot Studio agent builder [Web]
